Story Title: Migrate Customer Profile Service from DynamoDB to Aurora PostgreSQL
Story Description: Migrate customer profile data store from DynamoDB to Aurora PostgreSQL to support complex join queries needed for 360 view. Implement zero-downtime migration with dual-write pattern.

Story Title: Apply Critical Security Patch to Mobile App Authentication Library
Story Description: Apply emergency security patch for authentication library CVE affecting iOS and Android apps. Expedite through app store review, force-update users on vulnerable versions, and monitor adoption.

Story Title: Build Unified Customer 360 Profile Aggregating All Product Touchpoints
Story Description: Create single authoritative customer profile aggregating data from banking, investments, and insurance products. Enable personalized experiences across all channels and accelerate cross-sell revenue opportunities.

Story Title: Upgrade React Native Mobile App from Version 0.69 to 0.73
Story Description: Upgrade React Native version across iOS and Android mobile apps. Resolve breaking changes, update third-party libraries, and validate rendering parity on all supported device OS versions.

Story Title: Launch AI-Powered Personal Finance Manager with Predictive Insights
Story Description: Develop AI financial coaching feature providing personalized spending insights, savings goals, and investment recommendations. Target 25% increase in digital engagement and product cross-sell.

Story Title: Customer 360 API Integration Blocked Pending Legal Data Sharing Agreement
Story Description: Customer data aggregation API is fully built and tested but blocked on Legal finalizing data sharing agreements with three subsidiary entities. Engineering team has been idle for 6 weeks.

Story Title: Mobile Biometric Feature Blocked Awaiting Apple MDM Policy Exception
Story Description: Biometric authentication feature is blocked on corporate MDM policy preventing FaceID API access in managed app profiles. Escalated to Security and Vendor Management 4 weeks ago.

Story Title: Refactor Monolithic User Service into Domain-Scoped Microservices
Story Description: Break down monolithic user service into identity, profile, and preferences microservices. Implement event-driven communication, update API contracts, and migrate consumers incrementally.

Story Title: Resolve Production Data Pipeline Failures Causing Stale Customer Profiles
Story Description: Investigate and fix broken ETL pipeline causing customer profile data to be 48 hours stale. Implement idempotent retry logic and add monitoring to detect future pipeline failures within minutes.

Story Title: Develop Next-Generation Mobile Banking App with Biometric Authentication
Story Description: Rebuild mobile banking app with modern architecture, biometric auth, and personalized home screen. Capture millennial and Gen-Z market share and increase mobile MAU by 40%.

Story Title: Implement GraphQL Federation Layer Unifying Disparate Backend APIs
Story Description: Build federated GraphQL gateway consolidating 20+ REST microservices into unified schema. Enable frontend teams to ship features 3x faster without backend bottlenecks.

Story Title: AI Model Deployment Blocked by Missing GPU Node Pool Budget Approval
Story Description: ML inference service is ready for production but blocked on FinOps approving GPU node pool provisioning. Monthly cost estimate submitted and pending CFO approval since last quarter.

Story Title: Data Mesh Rollout Blocked on Data Governance Policy Ratification
Story Description: Domain data ownership model is designed and teams are trained but blocked on Chief Data Officer ratifying data governance policy needed before domains can publish data products.

Story Title: Consolidate Four Legacy REST APIs into Unified GraphQL Schema
Story Description: Merge four fragmented customer-facing REST APIs into unified GraphQL schema. Deprecate old endpoints with 6-month sunset, maintain backward compatibility via REST-to-GraphQL adapter.

Story Title: GraphQL Federation Blocked Pending Security Review of Schema Introspection
Story Description: Federation layer implementation complete but blocked on Security team completing threat model review of schema introspection exposure. Review requested 8 weeks ago with no update.

Story Title: Establish Data Mesh Architecture Enabling Domain-Owned Data Products
Story Description: Transform centralized data warehouse to federated data mesh. Enable 8 domain teams to own and publish their data products, reducing time-to-insight for analytics from weeks to days.

Story Description: DX improvements are scoped and prioritized but blocked because Platform Engineering team is fully consumed by critical production incidents. No capacity until Q3 at earliest.
